title: Planned Maintenance
lede: Programmatic service plans built around your facility — predictable scheduling, asset-level tracking, and reporting your CFO can take to a budget meeting.
metaDescription: Planned maintenance programs from STR Mechanical — HVAC and building controls service contracts across NC, VA, and SC.
featuresHeading: A maintenance program tailored to your equipment.
featuresLead: Every PM contract is built around your facility's equipment mix, operating hours, and risk tolerance — not a one-size template.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-3-6.7"/><path d="M21 4v6h-6"/></svg>
features.title: Scheduled inspections
features.body: Quarterly, semi-annual, or seasonal visits aligned to manufacturer recommendations and how hard your equipment actually runs.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>
features.title: Filter & belt changes
features.body: Filters, belts, lubrication, coil cleaning, refrigerant checks, and combustion analysis — all tracked and reported per visit.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 3v18h18"/><path d="M7 14l4-4 4 4 5-5"/></svg>
features.title: Asset-level reporting
features.body: Every piece of equipment gets a record — what we found, what we fixed, what's coming due. Reporting you can take to your CFO.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 2v6"/><path d="M12 16v6"/><path d="M4.93 4.93l4.24 4.24"/><path d="M14.83 14.83l4.24 4.24"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/></svg>
features.title: Combustion & refrigerant analysis
features.body: Burner tuning, refrigerant pressures, superheat/subcool measurements taken and logged — early warning on performance drift.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M12 6v6l4 2"/></svg>
features.title: 24/7 emergency response
features.body: PM customers get priority dispatch with a guaranteed response window — your equipment doesn't fail on a schedule, neither do we.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/></svg>
features.title: Capital planning
features.body: Annual reviews of equipment condition with replacement recommendations and rough-order budget numbers for your planning cycle.

whyHeading: Maintained equipment lasts longer, costs less, breaks less.
whyParagraphs: Reactive service is expensive. Emergency overtime, expedited parts, downtime in the building — every avoidable failure is a multiple of what a quarterly PM visit would have cost.
A well-run PM program extends equipment life 20-30%, cuts energy consumption, and turns unpredictable repair spend into a predictable line item.
whyBullets: Fewer emergency callouts and after-hours surprises
Lower energy bills from properly tuned equipment
Longer equipment life — defer capital replacement
Warranty compliance with documented service records
Better indoor air quality and tenant comfort
ctaHeading: Let's build a PM program for your facility.
ctaParagraph: Tell us about your equipment and we'll put together a proposal — typically within a week.
